Notice Of Motion And Motion For 1 Statutory Discharge 2 Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Costs; And 3 Deposit Of Funds In Court; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion
Off Calendar Apr-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BARRETT DAFFIN FRAPPIER TREDER & WEISS, LLP's Motion For 1. Statutory Discharge, 2. Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Costs; And 3. Deposit Of Funds In Court.

The unopposed motion is granted. The court orders as follows: Plaintiff is a disinterested stakeholder, has fulfilled its duties under Civ. Code 2924j(c) and 2924k. Plaintiff shall recover its reasonable attorneys' fees in the amount of $2,137.50 and its costs in the amount of $1,295.52, for a total recovery of $3,433.02. Plaintiff currently holds $122,021.79 in surplus funds. It shall deposit these funds, less its recovery of $3,433.02, with the registry of this court. Upon doing so, Plaintiff shall be discharged from any further liability to the claimants, defendants in this interpleader matter.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
